exercises.code:
from jinja2 import Template
print(Template("Hola {{ nombre }}").render(nombre="Ana"))

from jinja2 import Template
print(Template("{{ region }}: {{ median }} PEN (n={{ n }})").render(region="Lima", median=28.0, n=40))
exercises.justification_from_packet: KPI template with PEN and n.

exercises.code:
median = None
print("—" if median is None else median)

from jinja2 import Template
rows = [{"region": "Lima", "value": 28}, {"region": "Cusco", "value": 22}]
print(Template("{% for r in rows %}{{ r.region }}:{{ r.value }}\n{% endfor %}").render(rows=rows))

sections = [{"h": 1, "name": "Resumen"}, {"h": 1, "name": "Método"}]
print([s["name"] for s in sections])

sections = [{"h": 1}, {"h": 2}, {"h": 1}]
print(sum(1 for s in sections if s["h"] == 1))

chars, pages = 10, 2
print("needs_ocr" if chars / pages < 20 else "digital")

text = ""
print({"needs_ocr": not bool(text)})
print({"id": "H1", "evidencia": "Tabla1"}["id"])

s = "mediana 28 PEN n=40"
print("n=" in s)
print({"median_Lima": 28.0} == {"median_Lima": 28.0})

cap = "Fig1 | Fuente: sintetico | n=10"
print("Fuente" in cap)

def check_parity(a, b, c):
    return a == b == c
print(check_parity(1, 1, 2))
print(check_parity(1, 1, 1))
print([round(v, 1) for v in [28.04, 28.0]])
print({"status": "pending_review"}["status"])

import hashlib
print(hashlib.sha1(b"synthetic").hexdigest()[:8])
print(all({"dashboard": True, "xlsx": True, "doc": True}.values()))
